news.t: PCI Powerhouse Fund Fuels Hope Nationwide
PGIM expands fixed income ETF suite with launch of three actively managed corporate bond ETFs

overview.description: The PGIM Corporate Bond 5-10 Year ETF (PCI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund seeks to provide total return through an actively managed portfolio of investment grade corporate bonds from around the world, with maturities between five and 10 years. PCI was launched on Jul 29, 2025 and is issued by PGIM.

data.title: PCI Powerhouse Fund Fuels Hope Nationwide
data.text: WESTON, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AbbysHouse--Postal Center International (PCI), an industry leader in mail solutions, made significant donations from its PCI Powerhouse Fund to two impactful nonprofit...

data.title: PGIM expands fixed income ETF suite with launch of three actively managed corporate bond ETFs
data.text: NEWARK, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--New actively managed ETFs offer targeted exposure to short-, intermediate-, and long-term investment-grade corporate bonds.
